chain.thought: Explanation: The highest total wins recorded in the table is 11 in 1992. The fewest total wins recorded is 0 in 1918. (Seasons listed as “no team” are excluded as they have no wins value.)

judge_thought: Explanation: Scanning the Total Wins column, the highest value is 11 in 1992. The lowest (excluding the "no team" years) is 0 in 1918; all other seasons have at least 1 win. Therefore, the most wins occurred in 1992 and the fewest in 1918, matching the prediction.
